{{Infobox location
| name = Lesser Treasure Hall
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Lesser Treasure Hall Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The Lesser Treasure Hall, also known as the Lesser Treasure Hall of Heaven’s Glory, is the smallest of three specialized storage facilities within the [[Heaven’s Glory School]]. Despite its rank, it houses priceless artifacts—including weapons, elixirs, constructs, training supplements, and seals—that are valuable enough to be used as ransom for the children of major clans. The hall is a large, open room featuring vast rows of display cases or pedestals protected by transparent panes of [[Forged madra]]. Its exterior is marked by a prominent gold-lettered sign that utilizes script to gather [[aura]], ensuring visibility even during the night. The facility is protected by a [[Jade Forger]] stationed above it, as well as various security constructs and script-activated defenses hidden within the floors and doors. [[Elder Rahm]] serves as the supervisor for all three of the school's treasure halls, including this one. Within the hall, items are categorized by value; for instance, [[halfsilver]] weapons are kept on open shelves rather than in protective cases. Successful disciples who complete the [[Trial of Glorious Ascension]] before sunset are granted the privilege of selecting a single item from this hall for their personal use.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The Lesser Treasure Hall is one of three treasure halls located within the [[Heaven's Glory]] School and is identified by a towering sign featuring its name in gold letters. This facility houses various items for selection, including weapons, constructs, elixirs, and training supplements. Disciples are permitted to choose treasures from the hall once they have successfully survived the [[Trial of Glorious Ascension]]. A [[Jade Forger]] resides in a location directly above the hall, which is protected by a locked door containing deadly constructs and security scripts. Additionally, the floors of the hall contain hidden security constructs that are activated by [[scripts]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven's Glory]] School has a [[Lesser Treasure Hall]] containing weapons, training supplements, elixirs, and constructs.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Lesser Treasure Hall]] is a place from which disciples can select items after surviving the [[Trial of Glorious Ascension]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13">''Unsouled'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Lesser Treasure Hall]] is one of three treasure halls in the [[Heaven’s Glory School]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Lesser Treasure Hall]] has a towering sign with its name in gold letters.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Lesser Treasure Hall]] is a place where treasures can be chosen.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A [[Jade Forger]] lives over the [[Lesser Treasure Hall]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Lesser Treasure Hall]] contains script-activated security constructs hidden in its floors.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Lesser Treasure Hall]] has a locked door with security scripts and deadly constructs.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18">''Unsouled'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The ruined building was similar in size to the [[Lesser Treasure Hall]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] suggested speaking in the [[Lesser Treasure Hall]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“We can speak in the Lesser Treasure Hall.”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
